text.title: claude-advanced-features Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for claude-advanced-features as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Extended Thinking with budget_tokens=0 disables thinking silently.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A budget of 0 disables thinking silently but the API still processes the thinking parameter, causing confusion. Always set at least 1024 or use the explicit disable form.

failure-mode.description: Stripping thinking blocks from multi-turn history when continuing a thinking conversation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Thinking blocks must be preserved in multi-turn history. Stripping them breaks context and produces lower-quality responses.

failure-mode.description: Prompt Cache write cost is 25% higher than regular input tokens.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: On first call you pay more; savings start from second call. Expect to pay more overall if cache hit rate is below ~70%.

failure-mode.description: Batch API has no webhook; only poll-based status check.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Build your own polling loop or use a cron job. Batch API does not notify you of completion.

failure-mode.description: Computer Use generates OS-level commands (click, type, key) — executing them without sandboxing is a critical security risk.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Never run Computer Use actions on production systems. Always sandbox and implement human oversight.

failure-mode.description: Batch API errored results do not retry automatically.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: You must detect result.result.type == "errored" and resubmit failed items explicitly.

failure-mode.description: Extended Thinking outputs can include model reasoning about its own limitations — exposing thinking blocks to end users undermines trust.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keep thinking blocks internal to the agent. Use only the answer block for user-facing output.
